source:
serverless_endpoint = "inceptezsynapse-ws-ondemand.sql.azuresynapse.net"
database_name = "izdb"
table_name = "dbo.ext_bankdata"

# 2. Build the JDBC URL
jdbc_url = f"Server=tcp:izsynapseworkspacetest-ondemand.sql.azuresynapse.net,1433;Initial Catalog=master;Persist Security Info=False;User ID=izadmin;Password={your_password};MultipleActiveResultSets=False;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;"

# 3. Read the table into a DataFrame
df = spark.read \
    .format("com.microsoft.sqlserver.jdbc.spark") \
    .option("url", jdbc_url) \
    .option("dbtable", table_name) \
    .load()

# Show the data
display(df.limit(10))
